  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

EBA_X10ph2_PHEV_HEV

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DAE2F1
Recv ID: 18DAF1E2
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: E2
Func Name: E-ACT-EBA_29b

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "037",
    "soft": "0001",
    "version": "0001"
  }
]
